reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia. El playero cuando me estacione para cargar nafta se fue a hablar por celular y pasaron 10' y no volvió. Se me hacerco un personal policial femenino y me dijo que esperara. Directamente me fuy a la shell que está enfrente. La verdad una vergüenza..por culpa de una persona para la empresa ..

(Translated by Google)
Very bad experience. When I parked to fill up, the attendant went to talk on his cell phone and didn't return for 10 minutes. A female police officer approached me and told me to wait. I went straight to the Shell station across the street. It's truly shameful... all because of one person's negligence.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ajZDLVl3EAE
